title: Brand Kit (per-org)
description: Validates the per-org brand directory structure rooted at state/_orgs/<slug>/brand/. The directory has a v1-shape directory tree (theme/{palette.json,typography.json,logos}, masters/*.js, footnotes.yaml). This schema validates the JSON files (palette.json, typography.json) and lists required directory presence. Directory existence is checked imperatively by the brand-kit primitive; this schema validates the JSON file shapes.
description_internal: This schema is META — it describes what files MUST exist in state/_orgs/<slug>/brand/, plus the inner shape of the JSON members. The brand-kit primitive uses this for both filesystem presence checks AND palette/typography validation.

directory_layout.description: Filesystem layout invariants. The brand-kit primitive verifies these via os.path.exists, not via JSON schema validation.

required_directories_for_advisor.description: When the active mode is advisor, masters/ MUST be populated (deck rendering needs it). For non-advisor modes, masters/ is optional.

palette.description: Shape of theme/palette.json. v1 uses 16 named colors plus _meta. Schema is permissive (additionalProperties: true) to allow per-org extensions.

^[a-zA-Z][a-zA-Z0-9]*$.description: Hex color WITHOUT leading '#' (consumed by build_template.js as C lookup)

typography.description: Shape of theme/typography.json. v1 has heading/body font + size scales (title, h1, h2, h3, callout, subtitle, body, caption, tableHead, tableCell, footnote).

^[a-zA-Z][a-zA-Z0-9]*$.description: Font size in points (heading) or text-style identifier
